languages.text: "Ваша Светлость". {n}Медикарий, облаченный в защитное одеяние, на секунду отводит взгляд от стола, церемонно приветствуя вас.{/n} "Вивисектор Джейс Мартинакс, к вашим услугам. Визит Вольного Торговца — радостное событие для Сектора Бионика. Не окажете нам честь, став наблюдателем в операции?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Голос медикария в перчатках звучит звонко и мелодично:{/n}"Ткани могут начать отмирать в любой момент. Нужна глубинная стимуляция, готовлю нейромодулятор Зета-130 к пересадке".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость". {n}Медикарий, облаченный в защитное одеяние, на секунду отводит взгляд от стола, церемонно приветствуя вас.{/n} "Вивисектор Джейс Мартинакс, к вашим услугам. Визит Вольного Торговца — радостное событие для Сектора Бионика. Не окажете нам честь, став наблюдателем в операции?"

The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

"The patient's system alone will be unable to restore harmony to the patient's mind. Preparing Zeta-130 neuromodulator for transplant." {n}The gloved medicae officer speaks softly and almost melodically.{/n}

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

languages.text: 「患者の生体システムだけでは精神の調和は回復できない。ゼータ130ニューロモジュレーターの移植準備に入る。」{n}手袋をはめた医療官が、静かに、ほとんど歌うような調子で告げる{/n}
languages.original_text: "The patient's system alone will be unable to restore harmony to the patient's mind. Preparing Zeta-130 neuromodulator for transplant." {n}The gloved medicae officer speaks softly and almost melodically.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「患者の生体システムだけでは精神の調和は回復できない。ゼータ130ニューロモジュレーターの移植準備に入る。」{n}手袋をはめた医療官が、静かに、ほとんど歌うような調子で告げる。{/n}

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie. »{n}L'officier de medicae, vêtu d'une tenue de protection, détourne brièvement le regard de la table pour vous saluer solennellement.{/n} « Vivisecteur Jaze Martinax, pour vous servir. La visite {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} dans le secteur Bionica est un grand événement. Nous ferez-vous l'honneur d'assister à l'opération ? »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie. »{n}L'officier de medicae, vêtu d'une tenue de protection, détourne brièvement le regard de la table pour vous saluer solennellement.{/n} « Vivisecteur Jaze Martinax, pour vous servir. La visite {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} dans le secteur Bionica est un grand événement. Nous ferez-vous l'honneur d'assister à l'opération ? »

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Koruyucu giysiler içindeki sıhhiye subayı, seni ciddi bir şekilde karşılamak için gözlerini masadan kısa bir süreliğine ayırıyor.{/n} "Dirikesimci Jaze Martinax emrinizdedir. Hür Tacir'in ziyareti, Sektör Biyonika için çok önemli bir olay. Bize operasyonu gözlemleme onurunu bahşeder misiniz?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Koruyucu giysiler içindeki sıhhiye subayı, seni ciddi bir şekilde karşılamak için gözlerini masadan kısa bir süreliğine ayırıyor.{/n} "Dirikesimci Jaze Martinax emrinizdedir. Hür Tacir'in ziyareti, Sektör Biyonika için çok önemli bir olay. Bize operasyonu gözlemleme onurunu bahşeder misiniz?"

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Der Medicae-Offizier in Schutzkleidung blickt kurz vom Tisch auf, um dich mit einem feierlichen Nicken zu begrüßen.{/n} "Vivisektor Jaze Martinax, zu Euren Diensten. Der Besuch {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ist ein großer Moment für den Sektor Bionica. Erweist Ihr uns die Ehre, die Operation zu verfolgen?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Der Medicae-Offizier in Schutzkleidung blickt kurz vom Tisch auf, um dich mit einem feierlichen Nicken zu begrüßen.{/n} "Vivisektor Jaze Martinax, zu Euren Diensten. Der Besuch {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ist ein großer Moment für den Sektor Bionica. Erweist Ihr uns die Ehre, die Operation zu verfolgen?"

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El oficial de medicae ataviado de ropa protectora aparta la mirada de la mesa para recibirte con solemnidad.{/n} «Vivisector Jaze Martinax a su servicio. La visita de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente es un honor inmenso para el Sector Bionica. ¿Nos concederá el honor de presenciar la operación?».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El oficial de medicae ataviado de ropa protectora aparta la mirada de la mesa para recibirte con solemnidad.{/n} «Vivisector Jaze Martinax a su servicio. La visita de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente es un honor inmenso para el Sector Bionica. ¿Nos concederá el honor de presenciar la operación?».

languages.text: “大人。”{n}身穿防护服的医务官从手术台旁短暂抬头，用庄重的语调向你致意。{/n}“解剖者杰兹·马丁纳克斯，为您效劳。行商浪人的到访对仿生区而言意义重大。您愿意亲自见证这次手术吗？”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"
